Full Responses

▶ #102 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-long-phrase 1143 tokens · 155.8 tok/s

API variant: stop-long-phrase temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: In conclusion
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 7.34s prompt_tok: 41 comp_tok: 1143 tok/s: 155.8
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on a long multi-word phrase. Feature: stop with multi-token string.
Expected: essay contains paragraphs 1-2 about renewable energy, stops before
"In conclusion" appears. Tests buffer-based stop detection across token boundaries.
PROMPT Write a 3-paragraph essay about renewable energy. Start the last paragraph with "In conclusion".

▶ #78 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-double-newline 742 tokens · 126.7 tok/s

API variant: stop-double-newline temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop:
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 5.86s prompt_tok: 37 comp_tok: 742 tok/s: 126.7
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on double newline. Feature: stop parameter with "\n\n".
Expected: exactly one paragraph (about the ocean). The second paragraph about
mountains should NOT appear. finish_reason="stop".
PROMPT Write a short paragraph about the ocean. Then write a second paragraph about mountains.

▶ #82 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-period 692 tokens · 126.0 tok/s

API variant: stop-period temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: .
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 5.49s prompt_tok: 30 comp_tok: 692 tok/s: 126.0
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on punctuation (period). Feature: stop parameter with ".".
Expected: only the beginning of the first sentence, cut off before the first period.
finish_reason="stop". Very aggressive stop — output may be just a few words.
PROMPT Tell me about the sun in three sentences.

▶ #108 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-immediate 767 tokens · 125.7 tok/s

API variant: stop-immediate temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: The, I, A
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 6.1s prompt_tok: 27 comp_tok: 767 tok/s: 125.7
🎯 Test Intent
Tests immediate stop (first token matches). Feature: stop on common first tokens.
Expected: empty or near-empty output. The model's first token is likely "The", "I",
or "A" — all are in the stop list. finish_reason="stop", completion_tokens near 0.
PROMPT Explain what gravity is.

▶ #75 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-newline 817 tokens · 122.3 tok/s

API variant: stop-newline baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop:
Perf finish: stop load: 1.0s gen: 6.68s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 817 tok/s: 122.3
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on newline character. Feature: stop parameter with "\n".
Expected: exactly one line of output (the answer), no newline in content.
finish_reason="stop". Tests that escape sequences in stop are handled correctly.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #144 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ max-completion-tokens 1174 tokens · 121.9 tok/s

API variant: max-completion-tokens temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 9.63s prompt_tok: 29 comp_tok: 1174 tok/s: 121.9
🎯 Test Intent
Tests max_completion_tokens alias. Feature: max_completion_tokens (OpenAI SDK field).
Expected: output truncated at ~100 tokens, finish_reason="length". This field is an
alias for max_tokens used by newer OpenAI SDK versions. Verifies the alias is parsed.
PROMPT max_completion_tokens: 100

▶ #132 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ response-format-schema 1478 tokens · 121.6 tok/s

API variant: response-format-schema temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 resp_fmt: {"type":"json_schema","json_schema":{"name":"person","schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"age":{"type":"integer"},"hobbies":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["name","age","hobbies"]}}}
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 12.16s prompt_tok: 27 comp_tok: 1478 tok/s: 121.6
🎯 Test Intent
Tests json_schema response format. Feature: response_format with json_schema.
Expected: valid JSON conforming to schema — "name" (string), "age" (integer),
"hobbies" (array of strings). Verify is_valid_json=true and schema conformance.
PROMPT Generate a fictional person profile.

▶ #136 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ think-normal 833 tokens · 121.5 tok/s

API variant: think-normal temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 6.86s prompt_tok: 49 comp_tok: 833 tok/s: 121.5
🎯 Test Intent
Tests think extraction on non-thinking model. Feature: <think> tag extraction.
Expected: answer is "150 miles" with step-by-step work. reasoning_content should
be empty/null — this model has no <think> support. If reasoning_content is populated,
the model is unexpectedly emitting <think> tags (possible chat template issue).
PROMPT Solve step by step: If a train travels at 60 mph for 2.5 hours, how far does it go?

▶ #155 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ tool-call-auto 502 tokens · 121.3 tok/s

API variant: tool-call-auto temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 4.14s prompt_tok: 28 comp_tok: 502 tok/s: 121.3
🎯 Test Intent
Tests auto-detected tool call format. Feature: tool calling with auto-detected parser.
Expected: model emits a get_weather tool call with city="Tokyo" (or similar).
finish_reason="tool_calls". The parser should auto-detect xmlFunction for Qwen models.
Verify tool_calls array in response contains valid function name and arguments.
PROMPT What is the weather in Tokyo?

▶ #130 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ response-format-json 1303 tokens · 121.2 tok/s

API variant: response-format-json temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 resp_fmt: {"type":"json_object"}
Perf finish: stop json: valid load: 1.0s gen: 10.75s prompt_tok: 41 comp_tok: 1303 tok/s: 121.2
🎯 Test Intent
Tests json_object response format. Feature: response_format: json_object.
Expected: valid JSON with keys "language", "year_created", "creator" and values
"Python", 1991, "Guido van Rossum". Verify is_valid_json=true. Uses prompt injection
(not constrained decoding) — output may include markdown fences around JSON.
PROMPT Return a JSON object with keys "language", "year_created", and "creator" for Python.

▶ #60 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ kv-quantized 1148 tokens · 121.2 tok/s

CLI afm: --kv-bits 4
API variant: kv-quantized temp: 0.7 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 1.0s gen: 9.47s prompt_tok: 35 comp_tok: 1148 tok/s: 121.2
🎯 Test Intent
Tests KV cache quantization. Feature: --kv-bits 4 (4-bit quantized KV cache).
Expected: similar quality to small-kv (same prompt). KV quantization reduces memory
but may slightly degrade quality. Compare output quality with small-kv.
PROMPT Summarize the key ideas of machine learning in a few paragraphs.

▶ #138 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ think-raw 833 tokens · 121.2 tok/s

CLI afm: --raw
API variant: think-raw temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 6.88s prompt_tok: 49 comp_tok: 833 tok/s: 121.2
🎯 Test Intent
Tests raw mode on non-thinking model. Feature: --raw (skip think extraction).
Expected: same answer as think-normal (150 miles). Any <think> tags in output
pass through as literal text in content field. reasoning_content should be empty.
Verify no crash when --raw is used with a model that doesn't emit <think>.
PROMPT Solve step by step: If a train travels at 60 mph for 2.5 hours, how far does it go?

▶ #161 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ tool-call-multi 1169 tokens · 121.1 tok/s

API variant: tool-call-multi temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 1.0s gen: 9.65s prompt_tok: 35 comp_tok: 1169 tok/s: 121.1
🎯 Test Intent
Tests multiple tool calls in one response. Feature: parallel tool calling.
Expected: TWO tool calls — get_weather(city="London") AND get_time(timezone="Asia/Tokyo").
finish_reason="tool_calls". Tests that the parser handles multiple <tool_call> blocks.
PROMPT What is the weather in London and what time is it in Tokyo?

Expected: output truncated at ~100 tokens, finish_reason="length". This field is an
alias for max_tokens used by newer OpenAI SDK versions. Verifies the alias is parsed.
PROMPT Explain the causes and consequences of the French Revolution.

▶ #172 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ tool-call-none 475 tokens · 121.0 tok/s

API variant: tool-call-none temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 3.93s prompt_tok: 29 comp_tok: 475 tok/s: 121.0
🎯 Test Intent
Tests tool-bait prompt WITHOUT tools provided. Feature: no-tool hallucination check.
Expected: model answers naturally ("I don't have real-time data" or general info),
does NOT hallucinate tool_calls. finish_reason="stop" (not "tool_calls").
This is a weather question that would trigger tool calls if tools were available.
PROMPT What is the current temperature in Berlin?

Expected: get_weather tool call with location as a string. The "units" parameter has
anyOf [string, null] with default null — this must NOT crash Jinja template rendering.
finish_reason="tool_calls". Validates nullable schemas don't cause server errors.
PROMPT What is the weather in Chicago?

▶ #70 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ raw-mode 1226 tokens · 120.9 tok/s

Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 10.14s prompt_tok: 36 comp_tok: 1226 tok/s: 120.9

Tests raw mode. Feature: --raw (disables <think> tag extraction).
Expected: step-by-step reasoning leading to 391. Since this model does NOT support
thinking, <think> tags should NOT appear. If they do in raw mode, they pass through
as literal text in content (not extracted to reasoning_content).
PROMPT Think step by step: what is 17 * 23?

▶ #107 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-immediate 817 tokens · 120.8 tok/s

API variant: stop-immediate baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: The, I, A
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 6.77s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 817 tok/s: 120.8
🎯 Test Intent
Tests immediate stop (first token matches). Feature: stop on common first tokens.
Expected: empty or near-empty output. The model's first token is likely "The", "I",
or "A" — all are in the stop list. finish_reason="stop", completion_tokens near 0.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #100 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-json-object-key 4096 tokens · 120.5 tok/s

🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop inside json_object response format. Feature: stop + response_format: json_object.
Expected: JSON output stops when "age" key name appears. Output is truncated JSON.
Unlike guided-json, json_object uses prompt injection — stop still applies to raw output.
PROMPT Generate a JSON object with keys "name", "age", and "city" for a person named Carol.

PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

Expected: normal conversational response. The verbose flag only affects server-side
logging — response content and format should be identical to a non-verbose request.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #169 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ tool-call-nullable-param 191 tokens · 108.1 tok/s

Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 1.77s prompt_tok: 92 comp_tok: 191 tok/s: 108.1
🎯 Test Intent
Tests tool call with nullable parameter schema (regression: PR #33).
Expected: get_weather tool call with location as a string. The "units" parameter has
anyOf [string, null] with default null — this must NOT crash Jinja template rendering.
finish_reason="tool_calls". Validates nullable schemas don't cause server errors.
PROMPT tools: [{"type":"function","function":{"name":"get_weather","description":"Get weather for a location","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"location":{"type":"string","description":"City name"},"units":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"description":"Temperature units","default":null}},"required":["location"]}}}]

sequence matcher handles multi-byte UTF-8 characters correctly.

Tests CLI-level stop (--stop flag). Feature: afm --stop (server-side stop sequences).
Expected: same behavior as API stop — output lists items 1-2, stops before "3.".
This tests the CLI flag path rather than the API request body path.

🎯 Test Intent
Tests guided JSON with nested schema (object with array). Feature: --guided-json.
Expected: valid JSON with "city", "population" (integer), and "landmarks" (array of

PROMPT Describe Tokyo as a structured record with at least 3 landmarks.

▶ #127 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-low-max-tokens 100 tokens · 71.5 tok/s

API variant: stop-low-max-tokens baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 100 stop: 2.
Perf finish: length load: 1.0s gen: 1.4s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 100 tok/s: 71.5
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop vs max_tokens race. Feature: stop + low max_tokens combined.
Expected: stops at "2." (before max_tokens=100 is reached). finish_reason="stop".
If finish_reason="length", the stop sequence wasn't detected in time.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #51 mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ short-output 50 tokens · 44.8 tok/s

🎯 Test Intent
Tests max_tokens truncation with low limit (50 tokens). Feature: max_tokens param.
Expected: output abruptly cut off mid-sentence (~50 tokens). finish_reason="length".
The prompt intentionally asks for a long response to guarantee hitting the limit.
